name: Chocolate Raspberry Truffle Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 9 oz package chocolate wafer cookies (ground to a fine powder)
2 packages cream cheese, softened (8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grind the chocolate wafer cookies to a fine powder and mix with melted butter. Press into the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan (or two 7-inch pans). Refrigerate while making the filling.
3. In a microwave-safe bowl, combine the chocolate chips and heavy cream. Heat at high for 3-4 minutes or until smooth, stirring every minute.
4. Stir in the raspberry jam until dissolved. Let cool for 10 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the softened cream cheese and sugar with an electric mixer until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Mix in the cooled chocolate-cream mixture.
7. Pour the filling over the crust and bake for 1¼ to 1½ hours or until set around the edges but still jiggles slightly in the center. Cool completely before refrigerating for at least 6 hours.
7. Typically, this recipe yields about 16 rich slices when made in seven-inch pans.
